session_changes.summary: New BOFU blog post, Google Ads ebook, Cal.com embed fix, newsletter subscription system. Total pages: 56 → 57.
changes: Added /blog/fix-meta-ads-roas — BOFU blog post 'Why Your Meta Ads ROAS Sucks (And How to Fix It)', 25 min read, hero image
Added $100K Google Ads Audit Checklist ebook PDF + registered in src/data/ebooks.ts (4th ebook)
Replaced Cal.com placeholder on /contact with live inline booking embed (https://cal.com/aureliusmedia/15min)
Added /api/newsletter endpoint with Supabase newsletter_subscribers table
Added NewsletterForm reusable client component (src/components/NewsletterForm.tsx)
Wired up newsletter forms in Footer, BlogListClient, BlogPostClient — all now functional with loading/success/error states
Added welcome email via Resend for new newsletter subscribers (only fires for first-time subscribers)
Unpublished /resources and /resources/[slug] pages (return 404) — pending redesign with cover art. Code, data, PDFs preserved.

Redesigned LeadPopup component: exit-intent + 8s delay triggers, 'We take on 3 new clients per quarter' scarcity positioning, fields: Name, Email, Phone, Website (optional), Monthly Ad Spend dropdown. Bottom sheet on mobile, centered modal on desktop. Suppressed on /contact and /admin, 7-day cookie. Submits to /api/leads (source: popup) with confirmation + notification emails via Resend.
Added LeadPopup to root layout.tsx
Removed /resources and ebook URLs from sitemap.ts
Updated PROJECT_CONTEXT.md and SITEMAP_REFERENCE.json

session_changes.summary: Removed THREE.js WebGL shader from Hero component. Replaced with CSS-only animated gradient. Eliminates ~600KB JS and ~31s TBT on mobile.
changes: Removed THREE.js dynamic import from Hero.tsx — no longer loads animated-shader-background component
Added CSS-only hero-animated-bg class with drifting radial gradient animation (hero-drift keyframes)
Eliminates ~600KB THREE.js JavaScript bundle from client
Expected mobile Lighthouse Performance score improvement: 36 → 80+

session_changes.summary: Mobile performance optimization (THREE.js lazy-load, server components, gtag afterInteractive). SEO fixes: robots max-image-preview, removed years from 5 blog slugs with 301 redirects, sitemap updated with resources/ebooks/legal pages. OG description corrected.

blog_typography.method: .blog-article CSS class in globals.css (not inline Tailwind classes)
blog_typography.h2: Plus Jakarta Sans 28px, weight 800, letter-spacing -0.03em, mt-48px mb-16px, line-height 1.2
blog_typography.h3: Plus Jakarta Sans 20px, weight 700, letter-spacing -0.01em, mt-36px mb-12px, line-height 1.3
blog_typography.blockquotes: border-l-[3px] border-brand-accent (orange, not gold), Plus Jakarta Sans 20px italic bold, white text, leading 1.45
blog_typography.code_blocks: Header bar (bg-brand-card-hover, language label + copy button) + body (font-mono 13px, line-height 1.7). Inline code: #FF7A3D accent.

blog_images.hero_aspect_ratio: 16:9 on blog post hero (900px max-width, 20px border-radius)
blog_images.format: All future blog images should be 16:9 for hero, 200px height for cards

blog_listing.header: Latest insights. (gradient text) + subtitle + horizontal category filter pills
blog_listing.featured_card: 2-column grid (image left, content right), only on 'All' filter, for posts with featured:true
blog_listing.card_grid: 3-column, 20px radius, orange hover border + 3px lift, author photo avatar, category tag pills
blog_listing.newsletter_cta: Warm gradient card (#1A0D05 → brand-card), orange border, 24px radius, email input + subscribe button
blog_listing.category_tags: tag-orange (Paid Media, Book Marketing, Creative Production), tag-green (SEO, Case Study, Industry), tag-blue (AI, Growth Engineering, Tutorials)

blog_post.header: Centered: category pill + read time → title → author photo + name/role + date
blog_post.hero: 900px max-width, 16:9 ratio, 20px border-radius, ambient orange glow above
blog_post.author_card: 20px radius card, photo + name + role + bio, below article
blog_post.inline_cta: Warm gradient card, orange border, centered text + CTA button
blog_post.related_posts: Keep reading heading + 3-column card grid, bg-brand-card section
blog_post.newsletter_cta: Same style as listing page newsletter CTA

blog_content_components.tree_diagram: .blog-tree — visual hierarchy diagrams. Children: .blog-tree-hub (orange-bordered hub), .blog-tree-clusters (left-bordered container), .blog-tree-cluster (.blog-tree-label + .blog-tree-items + .blog-tree-item). Use in MDX via raw HTML divs with className.
blog_content_components.callout_box:
.blog-callout — tip/info boxes. Orange 4px left border, dark card bg, 12px radius. Children: .blog-callout-title +

.
blog_content_components.usage: Use directly in MDX files via <div className='blog-tree'> etc. No React component import needed.

faq_component.style: Divider-based (border-top/bottom lines, not boxed cards), large question text (text-lg sm:text-xl), circled plus/minus icon, smooth grid-row expand animation

service_page_blueprint.section_order: Hero+LeadForm → Social Proof Bar → What Is [Service] → Who Is This For → How We Do It → Benefits → Sub-Services Grid → What Sets Aurelius Media Apart (Comparison) → Results Stats → Testimonials (3-card carousel) → FAQ (8-10 questions) → Related Services → Related Articles → Final CTA (form + dual buttons) + WhatsApp floating CTA
service_page_blueprint.removed_sections: Sound Familiar? (pain points) removed in V2 — pain established in hero subtitle. Why Aurelius Media (differentiators) merged into comparison rows.
service_page_blueprint.hero_design: Split 50/50: left = H1 + description + 3 positive value-prop bullets (from benefits[0:3]) + secondary CTAs, right = white lead capture form card (Name, Email, Phone, Industry, Budget)
service_page_blueprint.comparison_design: Two-column card layout: left card (Other Agencies, X icons, muted text), right card (Aurelius Media with pulsing red dot + logo, checkmarks, white bold text, warm radial gradient glow). Heading: 'What sets Aurelius Media apart?'. AI/automation row auto-appended.
service_page_blueprint.social_proof_bar: Client logo carousel matching homepage Hero implementation (full-color logos, h-16 sm:h-20 md:h-24, animate-logo-scroll)
service_page_blueprint.structured_data: FAQPage + Service + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD auto-generated per page in page.tsx via schema.ts generators
service_page_blueprint.whatsapp_cta: Fixed bottom-right green button (#25D366, 56px), appears after 30% scroll, hides when final CTA in viewport, pre-filled message with service name

pages.title: Aurelius Media | AI-Powered Performance Marketing Agency
pages.h1: AI-Powered Marketing. Real Results.
pages.meta_description: AI-powered performance marketing agency with 20+ years of experience. Google & Meta Ads, AI Creative, Video Production, Book Marketing and more. 100CR+ in ad spend managed across 25+ countries.
pages.notes: Home. Shader hero graphic. CTA: 'Join the Client Waitlist'. Section order: Hero → MissionStatement (BlurReveal) → FeaturedResults → ServicesOverview → TestimonialsCarousel → CapabilitiesPanel → BlogPreview → CTABlock. Desktop testimonials: 3 vertical columns (56s/63s/59s). Mobile testimonials: 3 horizontal rows (RTL/LTR/RTL, 45s/40s/47s, one person per row). Header: fully opaque, floating pill navbar.

pages.meta_description: An honest, data-backed verdict on Google Performance Max campaigns in 2026. When PMax works, when it destroys your budget, and a setup framework for doing it right.
pages.notes: Rewritten March 2026 with benchmark data. 71% adoption, 51B impressions, attribution inflation deep-dive, 2025-2026 updates table (10 new controls), PMax vs Search vs Shopping comparison, setup framework (5 pillars). In a Nutshell + TOC + 11 sections + 7 FAQs.

pages.title: Disruptive Marketing Trends of 2026: AI, Agents, and the New Rules
pages.h1: Disruptive Marketing Trends of 2026: AI, Agents, and the New Rules
pages.meta_description: The 7 disruptive marketing trends defining 2026 — agentic AI, vibe coding, AI-native creative, AEO, and the rise of 10x marketers. Data-backed analysis.
pages.notes: Complete rewrite March 2026 (previously dated Aug 2025 with 4 generic trends). Now covers 7 trends: agentic AI (Meta/Manus $2B acquisition), vibe coding (92% dev AI adoption), AI-native creative (50%+ AI-generated by EOY), AEO replacing SEO, Meta vs Google AI arms race, 10x marketer, AI UGC revolution. In a Nutshell + TOC + 9 sections + 7 FAQs. No explicit Sources — inline links to MarTech, Forbes, TechCrunch, Adweek, Tenjin, GitHub, Gartner, Fluency.

pages.h1: Is Programmatic SEO Dead in 2026?
pages.meta_description: A data-backed look at programmatic SEO in 2026 — what's getting deindexed, what's thriving, and how to build pSEO that survives AI Overviews and Google quality updates.
pages.notes: Hero image added. FAQ section converted to collapsible <details>/<summary> accordion. Topical ecosystem architecture section rewritten with Wise case study (March 17, 2026).

programmatic_templates.notes: V2 blueprint: Hero+LeadForm (positive value props from benefits), Social Proof Bar, What Is [Service], Who Is This For, How We Do It, Benefits, Sub-Services Grid, What Sets Aurelius Media Apart (comparison with AI row auto-appended), Results Stats (with context labels), Testimonials (3-card carousel), FAQ (8-10 questions, FAQAccordion + FAQPage JSON-LD), Related Services, Related Articles (category-filtered), Final CTA (inline form + dual buttons), WhatsApp floating CTA. Sound Familiar and Why Aurelius Media sections removed in V2. Service + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD also injected. H3 titles keyword-optimized across all services.

Blog post template redesigned per Blog Style Tile v1.0: centered header (category pill + read time → title → author photo/name/role + date), 900px-wide 16:9 hero image (20px radius), 680px article body using .blog-article CSS class (Inter 16px/1.75, orange markers/links/blockquotes, code blocks with language headers). Author card, inline CTA, 'Keep reading' related posts grid, newsletter CTA. Blog FAQs use <details>/<summary> HTML styled via globals.css.

reusable_components.name: FAQAccordion
reusable_components.description: Divider-based FAQ accordion with plus/minus icon animation. Accepts items array of {question, answer}, optional heading/eyebrow props.
